characters.name: Abe Benedict
characters.description: Abe BenedictGeneral InformationFull NameAbe BenedictStatusAliveGenderMaleOccupationHeart surgeonTitle(s)M.D.AffiliationAtlanta General HospitalQuoVadisAppearancesSeasons2FirstAppearanceThe GermLastAppearanceBetrayalActorMike Pniewski Dr. Abe Benedictis a doctor at Atlanta General Hospital and the friend and mentor ofAJ Austin. He is portrayed byMike Pniewski. WhenAJ Austinwas a resident, he was Benedict's star pupil. After AJ became a surgeon in his own right, he and Benedict maintained a close friendship. For as long as AJ knew him, Benedict swore by only one type of heart valve device. However, Benedict later changed his views as AJ learned when he was ordered to implantBradley Jenkinswith aQuoVadisdevice. AJ questioned Benedict about his change of heart and Benedict told him about the benefits of the new device. However, it was later revealed that Benedict had been bought off byGordon Pageto help promote his devices.

He is an award winning surgeon and is incredible gifted. He is portrayed byMalcolm-Jamal Warner.

characters.name: Alec Shaw
characters.description: Alec ShawGeneral InformationFull NameAlec ShawStatusAliveGenderMaleOccupationInfectious Disease Specialist & Family Medicine PhysicianTitle(s)M.D.AffiliationChastain Park Memorial HospitalAppearancesSeasons2FirstAppearanceAfter the FallLastAppearanceBroker and BrokerActorMiles Gaston Villanueva Dr. Alec Shawis a Double Board Certified Physician in Family Medicine & infectious Diseases. He is portrayed byMiles Gaston Villanueva. Alecis a born innovator, a loner and iconoclast (or critic) who has spent a lifetime on the move. His father was an eccentric and Alec lived part of his childhood in a converted school bus. He studied to be an infectious disease doctor, but after a stint volunteering with Partners in Health on a Navajo reservation, he embraced a vision of medicine that tries to alter lifestyle via community outreach to prevent, rather than treat, illness. Alec is tender with patients, but blunt with everyone else, and yet he is a charmer. His relationships with women in the past seem to lack deep roots. Whenever it was necessary, he moved on.[1]

characters.name: Allie Palmer
characters.description: Allie PalmerGeneral InformationFull NameAllie PalmerStatusAliveOccupationNurseAffiliationHunter Cancer CenterRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed ChildAppearancesSeasons1FirstAppearanceIdentity CrisisLastAppearanceRun, Doctor, RunActorChrystee Pharris Allie Palmeris a nurse at theHunter Cancer Centerand a nursing school friend ofNicolette Nevin. She is portrayed byChrystee Pharris. Allie is first seen running into Nic at theHunter Cancer Center, where she works. They hug and agree to meet again. Later, they have drinks at a bar. Nic tries to get information on what it is like working withLane, but Allie gets uncomfortable and says she needs to relieve her babysitter and leaves.

characters.name: Billie Sutton
characters.description: Billie SuttonGeneral InformationFull NameBillie SuttonStatusAliveGenderFemaleOccupationNeurosurgeonTitle(s)Chief of SurgeryAffiliationChastainRelationshipsRelationshipsConrad Hawkins(Boyfriend)Dr.James Yamada(Ex-boyfriend)FamilyTrevor Daniels(son)AppearancesSeasons4, 5, 6FirstAppearanceRequiems & RevivalsActorJessica Lucas Billie Suttonis a former Fifth-Year Neurosurgery Resident atChastain Park Memorial Hospital. She is later promoted to chief of surgery and is a close friend of the late nurse practitioner,Nicolette Nevin. She also has a good relationship withConrad Hawkins. She has a crush on Conrad in Season 6 but cannot admit this because of his relationship withCade Sullivan. She is portrayed byJessica Lucas. Billie arrives after Nic goes into surgery. She shows some arrogance and manages to almost have a car crash withDevon Pravesh. When Billie actually walks inside the hospital, people are shocked to see her. Here, we learn that Billie was fired after doing a surgery without her attending and getting a patient killed doing this. Conrad is not the biggest fan of Billie since she accidentally killed a patient who turned out to be one of Conrad's. Shortly after Billie’s visit, she asked to return to Chastain. She starts as a resident working underBarret Cain.

characters.name: Bonnie Broome
characters.description: Bonnie BroomeGeneral InformationFull NameBonnie BroomeStatusAliveOccupationPediatricianRelationshipsFamilyLamar Broome(Husband)AJ Austin(Biological son)Two other childrenAppearancesSeasons3FirstAppearanceNurses' DayActorAdriane Lenox Bonnie BroomeisAJ Austin'sbiological mother. She is portrayed byAdriane Lenox. InStuck as Foretold, Austin reveals he has been looking into finding his birth parents. They are both prominent doctors, who chose their career over him a long time ago. His mother had gotten pregnant with him during med school and chosen to give her son up for adoption. His parents are currently married with two other grownup children.

characters.name: Catherine Loy
characters.description: Catherine LoyGeneral InformationFull NameCatherine LoyStatusAliveRelationshipsFamilyUnborn ChildAppearancesSeasons1OnlyAppearanceLost LoveActorJoanne Kelly Catherine LoyisConrad Hawkinsex-fiancé and a patient atChastain Park Memorial Hospital. She is portrayed byJoanne Kelly. Conrad is Catherine's ex-fiancé. He ended their relationship after punching his father at the rehearsal dinner, lying and telling her he didn't love her and the marriage wouldn't work. She is admitted to the hospital with mystery abdominal pain, that Conrad tries to diagnose while fighting the idea of Bell performing her operation.

characters.name: Claudia Webb
characters.description: Claudia Clare WebbGeneral InformationFull NameClaudia Clare WebbStatusAliveOccupationCatererRelationshipsFamilyUnknownAppearancesSeasons1OnlyAppearanceRun, Doctor, RunActorKathleen Wilhoite Claudia Webbwas a patient atChastain Park Memorial Hospital. She turns out to be a hero who helps previous criminals get their lives back together. She is portrayed byKathleen Wilhoite. Claudia was one of Devon's patients, who suddenly starts to hallucinate. He chases her through the hospital, and she threatens him and Irving with a knife. The hallucinations scare her, causing her to run out of the ER doors and get hit by an ambulance.

characters.name: Dax Ramsey
characters.description: Dax RamseyGeneral InformationFull NameDax RamseyStatusAliveGenderMaleOccupationProfessional Soccer PlayerAffiliationGeorgia FCAppearancesSeasons3FirstAppearanceHow Conrad Gets His Groove BackLastAppearanceSo Long, Dawn LongActorChris Mason Dax Ramseyis a nineteen-year-old rookie professional soccer player for Georgia FC and a patient atChastain Park Memorial Hospital. He is portrayed byChris Mason. Originally from Memphis, Tennessee, Dax was recruited by Georgia FC to be the new face of the franchise due to his incredible skill at the game, becoming the best rookie the team ever had. However, Dax became worried when he suffered injuries from the smallest things and felt weaker the more conditioning he did. Dax sought the advice of the team doctor, but the doctor was unable to find anything wrong and cleared Dax to play. However, Dax continued to suffer problems and continually dismissed the team doctor's concerns that there was something wrong with him. Due to his concerns, Dax requested his mentor, Reggie, to help him get a second opinion and Reggie decided to bring in DoctorConrad Hawkins, the man who had recently saved his life.

characters.name: Dr. Stewart
characters.description: Dr. Stewartis a doctor atChastain Park Memorial Hospital. He appears in the episodeIf Not Now, When?and was accused of neglecting one of his patients' needs and medical concerns, which led to a preventable death.Devon Praveshsuspected this to be due to a subconscious bias towards people of color. This was suspected when Dr. Pravesh questioned him subtly if he was a racist, based on how he tends to do more, even with little information, but only to patients that looked like him, to which he took offense toward.[1] It is unknown what happened to him afterward, but it is presumed that he is still working at Chastain.

characters.name: Eileen Jacoby
characters.description: Eileen JacobyGeneral InformationFull NameEileen JacobyStatusAliveOccupationNeurosurgeon (Formerly)Medical ProfessorAppearancesSeasons1OnlyAppearanceHauntedActorErika Slezak Eileen Jacobywas a patient dealing with hallucinations atChastain Park Memorial HospitalandConrad Hawkins' old medical professor. Before her retirement, she was a pioneering female neurosurgeon. There was footage of her doing brain surgery in the 1970's. All the other doctors were men, and they tried to keep her out of the OR, except they couldn't because she was so good. Eileen did the first microscopic AVM resection.

characters.name: Ellen Hundley
characters.description: Ellen HundleyGeneral InformationFull NameEllen HundleyStatusAliveOccupationER NurseAffiliationChastain Park Memorial Hospital(currently)St. Johns(Formerly)RelationshipsFamilyRaylee Hundley(daughter)AppearancesSeasons1,2,3,4,5,6FirstAppearanceIdentity CrisisLastAppearanceDoors Opening, Doors ClosingActorDenitra Isler Nurse Ellen Hundley, is an emergency room nurse atChastain Park Memorial Hospital. She is portrayed byDenitra Isler. In "Identity Crisis", due to budget cuts, Hundley is let go of and gets a new job at St. John's. Feldman notes that Hundley was "too experienced, too good, too expensive." However, her replacement,Nurse Tiffany, an inexperienced nurse, erroneously triagesa young manduring a mass casualty event, resulting in his death. At the end of the day, Hundley is re-hired by Chastain thanks to Conrad and provides him with the John Doe's recovered cell phone, allowing Conrad to contact the young man's mother and inform her of her son's death.
